subject: URGENT: Production outage
body: Our production database is down. Clients are seeing 500 errors. Fix immediately.

subject: Emergency board meeting tomorrow
body: We have a crisis. Need all hands on deck by 8am tomorrow. This is critical.

subject: System completely broken - losing revenue
body: Your system has been down for 2 hours. We are losing $10k/hour. Fix this NOW or we cancel the contract.

subject: Data breach detected - immediate action required
body: We have detected unauthorized access to customer data. This requires immediate escalation and response.

subject: CRITICAL: Contract expires in 2 hours
body: The master service agreement expires at 5pm today. Sign and return immediately or deal is void.

subject: Server down - all users affected
body: Our auth server is returning 503 for all users. Engineering please respond ASAP.

subject: Outage - SLA breach imminent
body: We are at 59 minutes of downtime. Our SLA allows 60 minutes. You are about to breach contract.

subject: Payroll system failure - payday tomorrow
body: The payroll system has failed and payday is tomorrow. This needs immediate resolution.

subject: Kubernetes cluster unresponsive
body: All pods in prod namespace are in CrashLoopBackOff. Service is completely unavailable.

subject: Court filing due in 1 hour
body: We need the signed affidavit in the next 60 minutes or we miss the court deadline.

subject: Contract review needed
body: Please review and sign the attached contract by Friday.

subject: Action required: approve budget
body: Please approve the Q3 budget proposal ASAP before the deadline Monday.

subject: Proposal for Q4 renewal - respond by EOW
body: Attached is our renewal proposal for Q4. We need a decision by end of week to proceed.

subject: Board presentation prep - need slides by Thursday
body: The board meeting is Friday. I need your section of the deck by Thursday noon.

subject: Integration broken after your last deploy
body: Your API changes broke our integration. We need a hotfix or rollback. Please prioritize.

subject: Performance review sign-off required by Friday
body: Please complete and sign off on your team's performance reviews by end of Friday.

subject: PO approval needed - vendor payment overdue
body: The vendor has flagged overdue payment. Please approve PO #4521 today.

subject: Compliance report due next week
body: We require your compliance documentation by next Tuesday for our regulatory audit.

subject: Close this deal by Friday - $500k contract
body: I need you to follow up with Acme today. This is a $500k deal and we close Friday.

subject: VIP customer ticket escalated - 4hr SLA
body: Ticket #9922 from our platinum customer is now in escalation. SLA is 4 hours.

subject: Weekly sync reminder
body: Just a reminder our weekly sync is tomorrow at 10am.

subject: Sprint planning next Monday
body: Sprint planning is scheduled for Monday at 2pm. Please prepare your items.

subject: Follow-up on last week's demo
body: Thanks for the demo last week. We are evaluating the product and will get back to you.

subject: Updated leave policy document
body: Please find attached the updated leave policy. Read and acknowledge by end of month.

subject: Your ticket has been updated
body: Your support ticket #1234 has been updated. The team is working on your issue.

subject: Monthly report reminder
body: Please submit your monthly activity report by the last day of the month.

subject: Question about feature X
body: Hi, can you clarify how feature X works? We had some confusion during onboarding.

subject: New product launch next quarter
body: We are launching a new product next quarter and wanted to discuss partnership opportunities.

subject: Code review request
body: Hi, could you review my PR when you get a chance? No rush, just want a second pair of eyes.

subject: Maintenance window scheduled for Sunday
body: We will be performing routine maintenance Sunday 2-4am. Minimal disruption expected.

subject: This week in AI: GPT updates, new models
body: Here is your weekly digest of AI news and updates. No action required.

subject: 3 people viewed your profile this week
body: See who is looking at your profile. Connect with new people in your industry.

subject: GitHub Actions run completed
body: Your workflow run for branch feature/xyz completed successfully. All checks passed.

subject: Your invoice is ready
body: Your monthly invoice for $199 is now available. Payment will be processed automatically.

subject: You are registered for DevConf 2026
body: Thank you for registering. Your confirmation number is #DC2026-4521.

subject: Team lunch this Friday!
body: We are doing a team lunch this Friday at noon. Hope to see everyone there!

subject: Issue assigned to you: Update docs
body: DOCS-123 has been assigned to you: Update API documentation for v2 endpoints.

subject: Top products of the week
body: Check out the top-rated products launched this week on Product Hunt.

subject: Monthly security digest
body: Here is your monthly security summary. No critical vulnerabilities were found this month.

subject: Happy work anniversary!
body: Congratulations on your 3-year work anniversary with us! Thank you for your contributions.

subject: Upsell opportunity - expand to 500 seats
body: We are happy with the product and want to discuss expanding to 500 seats across all teams.

subject: RFP response needed by next Friday
body: We are evaluating vendors and need your RFP response by next Friday to be considered.

subject: HIPAA compliance documentation required
body: Our compliance team needs your HIPAA BAA and security documentation before we can proceed.

subject: AWS bill 3x higher than expected this month
body: Our AWS costs are $45k this month vs $15k last month. Need to investigate and act.

subject: Quarterly OKR review - prepare by Thursday
body: Our quarterly OKR review is Friday. Please have your team results ready by Thursday.

subject: NDA required before sharing technical specs
body: Please sign the attached NDA. Once received we can share the full technical specification.

subject: API rate limiting causing failures in production
body: We are hitting rate limits on your API which is causing failures in our production pipeline.

subject: Technical deep-dive call - can you do tomorrow?
body: Our engineering team wants a deep-dive on your API architecture. Can we schedule tomorrow?

subject: Budget freeze effective immediately
body: All discretionary spending is frozen effective today. Please hold any pending approvals.

subject: Feature request blocking our launch
body: We cannot launch without the bulk export feature. This is blocking us. What is the ETA?
